name: finish-task
description: Finish coding work with review gates, visual evidence, and repo-appropriate delivery through PRs or personal main.

interface.shortDescription: Finish coding work with review, evidence, and delivery gates.
interface.longDescription: A project-neutral finish workflow that reviews diffs, runs verification, captures visual evidence when needed, and delivers through PRs or guarded main merges based on repository metadata.
defaultPrompt: Finish this task and create a PR.
Review this diff and prepare it for delivery.
Finish and merge this local worktree into main.
